channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: University of Canberra launches checklist to help carers identify delirium
item.description: Alex, a 39-year-old man with no prior history of mental illness or drug use, was admitted to a Canberra hospital after experiencing extreme delusions and agitation following a snowboarding trip overse...

item.title: Clarifying the Terms Somalia, Somali, and Somaliland
item.description: This article explains the correct usage of terms related to the Horn of Africa region. Somalia refers to the Federal Republic of Somalia, a country in East Africa recognised internationally, which has...

item.title: 15-year-old arrested after teenage girl stabbed at Thorpe St Andrew School
item.description: A 15-year-old boy has been arrested following the stabbing of a teenage girl at Thorpe St Andrew School near Norwich. The victim sustained minor injuries and was taken to hospital. The incident occurr...

item.title: Government Relocation Plan Aims to Restore Ruaha River and Protect National Park
item.description: Ruaha National Park in Tanzania is one of Africa's most precious wildlife areas, with vast miombo woodlands, diverse wildlife, and over 570 bird species. However, the Ruaha Mkuu River, which sustains ...

item.title: Analysis of Iran's Transnational Repression and Diaspora Threats in 2026
item.description: The article by Thomas Juneau examines the evolving threat posed by the Islamic Republic of Iran, particularly in 2026. It highlights that, despite potential instability due to war or internal vulnerab...

item.title: Riverside Police Department Moves to Terminate Three Officers Over Use of 100% Disabled Veteran License Plates Amid Discrimination Lawsuit
item.description: Three Riverside Police Department officers—Timothy Popplewell, Richard Cranford, and Raymond Olivares—are facing termination after the city refused to settle their lawsuit alleging discrimination base...

item.title: Nigeria Estimates $23 Billion Needed to Expand Electricity Access to Underserved Communities
item.description: The Rural Electrification Agency (REA) don yan say Nigeria need around $23 billion to solve electricity wahala for underserved and unserved communities across the country. Abba Abubakar Aliyu, the MD ...

item.title: VP Sara Duterte warns against using children in spreading fake news
item.description: Vice President Sara Duterte expressed concern over the unauthorized use of her minor son's photo in online posts spreading false information. In a statement released on Wednesday, she emphasized that ...

item.title: Correctional Service of Canada to Eliminate Prison Librarian Positions Despite Human Rights Concerns
item.description: The Correctional Service of Canada (CSC) is finalizing plans to eliminate all prison librarian positions across federal institutions, citing cost-saving measures under the 2025 federal budget. Advocat...

item.title: Tabora Regional Road Board allocates 50.9bn/- for road construction and maintenance in 2026/2027
item.description: The Tabora Regional Road Board has officially approved a budget of 50.9 billion Tanzanian shillings for the Rural and Urban Roads Agency (TARURA) to manage the construction, rehabilitation, and mainte...

item.title: Kapamilya stars reminisce their memorable moments and plot twists in 'Roja'
item.description: The popular TV series 'Roja' has left a lasting impression on both viewers and the actors involved. In a recent feature, several stars of the show shared their most unforgettable experiences and favor...

item.title: Garo Hills Council elections postponed amid continuing unrest in Meghalaya
item.description: The Meghalaya government has postponed the elections to the Garo Hills Autonomous District Council (GHADC) that were scheduled for April 10, 2026, due to ongoing violence in parts of the state. Chief ...

item.title: Philippine Army Recovers P5.9 Billion Worth of Shabu from Abandoned Speedboat in Occidental Mindoro, Two Suspects Arrested
item.description: Troopers from the Philippine Army's 2nd Infantry Division discovered a large quantity of shabu, estimated at P5.9 billion in street value, inside an abandoned speedboat that ran aground in Barangay Ha...

item.title: KCB Challenges Kenya Cup Draw Against Kabras Over Rules Interpretation
item.description: KCB Rugby Club has officially lodged an appeal with the Kenya Rugby Union (KRU) Appeals Committee after their match against Kabras Sugar, which was halted at half-time due to heavy rains, was ruled a ...

item.title: John Crace skewers Kemi Badenoch's poor PMQs performance amid Tory discontent and Iran policy U-turn
item.description: In his latest political sketch for The Guardian, John Crace delivers a scathing critique of Conservative leader Kemi Badenoch's performance at Prime Minister's Questions on 11 March 2026. He portrays ...

item.title: North West records lowest crime rate since 2022 despite certain increases
item.description: Crime levels in North West province showed a notable decline in the last quarter of 2025, with community-reported incidents dropping by 4.1%, according to MEC for Community Safety and Transport Manage...

item.title: Netflix Acquires AI Startup InterPositive, Co-Founded by Ben Affleck, for Up to $600 Million
item.description: Netflix has reportedly acquired InterPositive, an AI-focused company co-founded by Ben Affleck, for a deal potentially worth up to $600 million. InterPositive develops tools that assist filmmakers in ...

item.title: Replit Raises $400 Million in Series D at $9 Billion Valuation
item.description: Replit, the AI-powered platform enabling 'vibe-coding' where users describe app ideas in natural language for AI to build them, announced a major funding milestone on March 11, 2026. The company secur...

item.title: Former Nairobi Governor Mike Sonko Buys Limited-Edition Samsung Galaxy Z TriFold
item.description: Former Nairobi Governor Mike Sonko has just added a very rare gadget to his collection — the Samsung Galaxy Z TriFold. This phone is super exclusive, with only 500 units made worldwide, and Sonko has ...

item.title: Experts offer advice on developing an authentic personal style beyond fleeting trends
item.description: The article explores the concept of personal style, arguing that it should reflect one's authentic self rather than chasing transient microtrends like cottagecore or quiet luxury, which often promote ...
